subject: reading
activity_templates: A 4th-grade reading comprehension worksheet. A 2-paragraph kid-friendly fiction passage with a small illustration. 5 short-answer questions below (main idea, character, setting, inference, theme) with writing lines. {{character}} reads alongside.

A 4th-grade non-fiction comprehension worksheet about a kid-safe science or history topic. 2-paragraph passage with a diagram. 4 comprehension questions (2 multiple-choice, 2 short-answer). {{character}} points at the diagram.
A 'context clues' vocabulary worksheet. A short passage with 4 bolded unfamiliar kid-friendly words. Child writes the meaning of each based on context clues. {{character}} taps chin thoughtfully.
A 'compare and contrast' worksheet. Two short cartoon-style passages followed by a Venn diagram for the child to fill in similarities and differences. {{character}} stands between them.
